name: ynETH MAX
redeem: ynETHx can be redeemed for ETH through a dedicated withdrawal buffer; under normal conditions withdrawals are instant and first-come, first-served. If the buffer is depleted, withdrawals pause until rebalancing refills it, which docs say can take about 1-10 days; users may alternatively exit through secondary-market swaps.
notes: ERC-4626 ETH-based MAX LRT with WETH as primary underlying asset and exposure to ynETH, ynLSDe, ETH, and WETH. Strategy allocation is DAO/subDAO managed and more complex than a simple staking receipt.
